Name: India
PopularFacts: India is the world's largest democracy and has the largest population in the world.

Name: United States
PopularFacts: The United States is the third largest country in the world by land area and has a diverse culture influenced by its inhabitants.

Name: China
PopularFacts: China is the world's most populous country and has a rich history that dates back thousands of years.

Name: Brazil
PopularFacts: Brazil is the largest country in South America and is known for its vibrant culture, including samba music and the Amazon rainforest.

Name: Australia
PopularFacts: Australia is the world's sixth largest country by land area and is home to unique wildlife such as kangaroos and koalas.

Name: Japan
PopularFacts: Japan is an island nation known for its blend of traditional culture and modern technology, as well as its cherry blossoms and sushi cuisine.
